name: community-fs-bold-signal
title: Bold Signal
description: High-impact dark deck theme: a vibrant #FF5722 orange card floats on a #1a1a1a charcoal gradient, with giant 01/02 section numbers top-left, breadcrumb navigation top-right, grid-precise alignment, and Archivo Black display type over Space Grotesk body. Single-file HTML on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides bold-signal (STYLE_PRESETS section 1).

description_i18n.en: High-impact dark deck theme: a vibrant #FF5722 orange card floats on a #1a1a1a charcoal gradient, with giant 01/02 section numbers top-left, breadcrumb navigation top-right, grid-precise alignment, and Archivo Black display type over Space Grotesk body. Single-file HTML on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides bold-signal (STYLE_PRESETS section 1).
description_i18n.zh-CN: 高冲击暗调幻灯片主题「橙色信号」：#FF5722 橙色卡片浮于 #1a1a1a 深灰渐变之上，左上巨型章节号 01/02，右上面包屑导航，网格精准对齐，Archivo Black 显示字 + Space Grotesk 正文。固定 1920x1080 舞台等比缩放的零依赖单文件 HTML。移植自 zarazhangrui/frontend-slides 的 bold-signal 风格预设。

query.en: Create a Bold Signal deck about {{topic}} for {{audience}} ({{slideCount}}, {{density}}): a high-impact dark presentation in the locked Bold Signal theme from frontend-slides. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies - all CSS/JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries, no CDN scripts; only Google Fonts CSS may be linked. THEME IS LOCKED - reproduce exactly: (a) Tokens: --stage-bg:#0d0d0d; --slide-bg:#1a1a1a; --bg-gradient:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a1a 0%,#2d2d2d 50%,#1a1a1a 100%); --card-bg:#FF5722; --card-bg-soft:rgba(255,87,34,0.12); --text-primary:#ffffff; --text-secondary:rgba(255,255,255,0.62); --text-faint:rgba(255,255,255,0.34); --text-on-card:#1a1a1a; --line:rgba(255,255,255,0.14); fonts 'Archivo Black' display (uppercase, tight leading) and 'Space Grotesk' body; easing cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1). No other hues, no gradients beyond the charcoal background, no rounded corners on cards - sharp rectangles only. (b) Signature chrome on every content slide: giant orange slide number (01, 02...) top-left in Archivo Black; uppercase breadcrumb nav top-right with the active section at full opacity and the rest at --text-faint; a 1px baseline rule across the bottom with uppercase letterspaced captions left/right. Grid-precise alignment off a 96px slide padding. (c) Stage system: fixed 16:9 - author every slide at 1920x1080 inside .deck-viewport > .deck-stage; JS scales the whole stage with one transform (factor = min(innerWidth/1920, innerHeight/1080), translate to center with letterbox); never reflow content per device, no responsive breakpoints inside slides; include the full viewport-base.css block (print one-slide-per-page, prefers-reduced-motion). (d) Each page is one <section class="slide">; switch only via .active/.visible classes toggling visibility/opacity/pointer-events - never display:none. (e) Navigation: keyboard arrows/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End, debounced wheel (~650ms), touch swipe (>=40px), #/<index> hash routing with deep-link restore; page counter in .deck-controls fixed outside the scaled stage. (f) Motion: entrances via .reveal elements staggered with transition-delay (~0.1s steps) when the slide gains .visible; animate only transform and opacity; bars use scaleY from transform-origin bottom. (g) Layout masters to compose from (all present in example.html): orange title card cover, numbered agenda list with hairline rules, section divider with a giant outline-stroked number (-webkit-text-stroke in --card-bg), icon bullet points with square orange ticks, big stat with oversized orange numeral, oversized quote with orange quotation mark, two-column comparison where the highlighted column is a solid orange card, 2x2 principle grid, pure-CSS bar chart, closing slide with an orange accent word. Icons are inline SVG only; visuals are CSS-generated - no remote images, no Chart.js/mermaid. No scrolling or overflow: split content into more slides instead of shrinking type. Start from the example.html seed shipped in this plugin: keep its :root tokens, stage CSS, slide-shell chrome, and the entire navigation controller script verbatim; replace only the slide content. Do not introduce any color or font outside this specification and do not redesign the theme.
query.zh-CN: 用「橙色信号 Bold Signal」主题为 {{audience}} 创作一套关于 {{topic}} 的演示（{{slideCount}}，{{density}}）：高冲击暗调风格——#FF5722 橙色卡片浮于 #1a1a1a 深灰渐变，左上巨型章节号、右上面包屑导航、底部基线规则线，Archivo Black 显示字 + Space Grotesk 正文，直角无圆角。零依赖单文件 HTML，固定 1920x1080 舞台整体等比缩放（绝不按设备重排），section.slide + .active/.visible 切换，键盘/滚轮/触摸导航 + hash 路由，.reveal 错峰入场动画。从插件内 example.html 种子出发：保留全部设计 token、舞台系统、页面骨架和导航脚本，只替换内容；禁止引入规格之外的颜色和字体。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。

exampleOutputs.title: Pulse Analytics pitch - Bold Signal deck

title_i18n.en: Pulse Analytics pitch - Bold Signal deck
title_i18n.zh-CN: Pulse Analytics 融资演示 · 橙色信号风格

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: A product launch, a strategy review, a conference talk...

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: Investors, a product team, meetup attendees...
